/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/cli/Menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/db/Database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/models/Account.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/models/AuditLog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/models/Transaction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/models/User.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/repository/AccountRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/repository/AuditLogRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/repository/TransactionRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/repository/UserRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/services/AdminService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/services/AuthService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/services/BankService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/services/UserRepository.cpp.o -o main  /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd
